name: Chaos magic servitor: an artificial spirit created by the magician from their own psychic energy, given a specific task and a finite lifespan. FSPLIT: the magician expels the servitor from their psyche, splitting one consciousness into the magician's waking awareness and the servitor's autonomous mission-awareness. FFUSE: when the servitor completes its task or its lifespan expires, it is reabsorbed — the magician's psyche reconstitutes with the servitor's experience integrated. VINIT: the magician before any creation. TANCH: the servitor's sigil as its life-boundary. AFWD: servitor dispatched to its task. AREV: servitor recalled for absorption. ENGAGR: the servitor is simultaneously part of the magician (same psychic substance) and independent (has its own apparent agency).

phase_0.boundary_condition: the servitor's sigil as its life-boundary

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before anything is named

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains the whole system

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the magician's psyche with integrated experience

EVALT.chosen_element: the servitor successfully completes its task

EVALF.chosen_element: the servitor fails or expires without completion

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the servitor is simultaneously part of the magician and independent

IFIX.chosen_element: the sigil is burned or destroyed upon reabsorption

phase_2.split_element: the magician expels the servitor from their psyche
phase_2.fuse_result: the magician's psyche with integrated experience

phase_3.true_description: the servitor successfully completes its task
phase_3.false_description: the servitor fails or expires without completion
phase_3.both_description: the servitor is simultaneously part of the magician and independent

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the magician recognizes their own self-awareness
Step 2 AREV: the magician descends into the subconscious to gather energy
Step 3 FSPLIT: the magician expels the servitor from their psyche
Step 4 AFWD: the servitor is dispatched to its task
Step 5 FFUSE: the servitor is reabsorbed upon completion or expiry
Step 6 CLINK: the magician composes the sequence of creation, dispatch, task, recall, absorption
Step 7 IFIX: the sigil is burned or destroyed as permanent record
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the magician recognizes their integrated self

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the magician's will and ritual technique
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the magician's subconscious and the servitor's mission imprint
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the servitor's finite lifespan and task completion trigger
phase_5.alfs_store: the canonical grimoire or tradition of chaos magic

phase_6.cycle_cost: psychic energy expended in creation and dispatch
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: the magician's psyche whole but unexpanded
phase_6.post_cycle_state: the magician's psyche whole with integrated experience
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle returns to the same psychic substance, only enriched
